name: Bing: Web Search
summary: Return up to 10 organic web results from Bing for one search query.
description: Run a Bing web search in a fresh tab and return up to 10 organic result cards (title, url, source, snippet). Use for general-purpose web lookups. Do not use for images (`bing_images_search`), news (`bing_news_search`), or videos (`bing_videos_search`).

steps.name: Wait for the Bing search box
Wait for the organic results list
Extract organic results and decode Bing ck/a redirector URLs

help.summary: Return up to 10 organic web results from Bing for one search query.

examples.command: rzn-browser run bing web-search --param search_query="claude code release notes"
examples.description: Plain web lookup, returns title / url / source / snippet for each of the first 10 organic results.

returns: Array of { title, url, source, snippet }.
notes: Read-only: no logins, cookies, or mutations.
Drives the homepage search box (`#sb_form_q`) rather than hitting `/search?q=...` directly so traffic looks human.
Organic only — sponsored (`li.b_ad`) results are skipped by the item selector.
Opens a fresh tab; safe to run in parallel with the other bing workflows.
